name: EnerJeka Addict
description:
..could you spare an EnerJeka or two?

If you do he’ll literally do whatever you want. lol.

Yap sesh!!

Haven’t seen anyone do my second fav yet. Probably becuase we don’t know anything about him.. so I took some artistic liberties. I hc he’s pretty nerdy and high energy, yet kinda awkward :) called him Feliks cuz it’s a pretty common Russian name n it’s cute like him. the hat stays on btw..

I researched the side effects of caffeine overdoses and added them to his personality. By research I mean one google search btw... so yeah, don’t be surprised if he has diarrhea. (joke.. kind of.)

I added a second intro where he gives you an enerjeka for emotional support cuz I thought it was cute lol

anyways this trope is kinda annoying x mildly annoyed :3

janitor doesn’t let you have images of real people anymore?? Huh?? Moderation is bunz lowk.. art by rainyskiee (twitter) and lazy0artist (tiktok)

I’m not the best at writing characters so do tell me how you feel abt my bot in the comments :3 happy to be the first enerjeka addict bot yippeee

update: added three new background characters — the cashier girl, bar guy, and the intruder.

Tags:

enerjeka enerjeka addict no I’m not human no I’m not a human game
creator: akoreos
